2606.31741.title: STEB: Style Text Embedding Benchmark
2606.31741.paper_summary: While semantic embeddings are rigorously evaluated on the Massive Text Embedding Benchmark, the evaluation of style embeddings remains fragmented, with each work relying on their own set of tasks and datasets. To bridge this gap, we introduce the Style Text Embedding Benchmark, a comprehensive open-source benchmark intended to standardize the evaluation of style embeddings. STEB encompasses 96 datasets across 7 languages, spanning applications such as authorship verification, authorship retrieval, AI-text detection, probing of linguistic features, and others. We find that semantic embeddings consistently fail in stylistic tasks, and that there is no style embedding that is universally superior across all tasks evaluated. We open-source the STEB code base at: https://github.com/rrivera1849/STEB.
2606.31741.paper_summary_zh: 雖然語義嵌入在大型文本嵌入基準上經過嚴格評估，但風格嵌入的評估仍然是片段化的，每項工作依賴於自己的一套任務和數據集。為了填補這一空白，我們推出了風格文本嵌入基準（Style Text Embedding Benchmark，簡稱STEB），這是一個全面的開源基準，旨在標準化風格嵌入的評估。STEB涵蓋了來自7種語言的96個數據集，涉及作者驗證、作者檢索、AI文本檢測、語言特徵探測等應用。我們發現語義嵌入在風格任務中始終表現不佳，並且在所有評估的任務中，沒有一種風格嵌入在所有任務中都是普遍優越的。我們將STEB代碼庫開源於：https://github.com/rrivera1849/STEB。
2606.31741.author: Rafael Rivera Soto et.al.
2606.31741.authors: Rafael Rivera Soto, Anna Wegmann, Cristina Aggazzotti
